hero_subtitle: SFTY Business empowers regulated digital asset firms with secure on-premise deployment to maintain data control, audit-ready evidence, and scalable compliance governance.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions
trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk
trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow
trust_card_4_value: Message routing, completeness checks and exception handling
trust_card_5_value: Regulatory changes mapped to internal rule
trust_card_6_value: Decision logs and evidence for every review
problem_title: Data control weakens without on-premise deployment
problem_description: Enterprises face challenges maintaining audit readiness and evidence integrity when compliance data and logs reside outside controlled on-premise environments. This creates gaps in governance, complicates permissions management and slows preparation for bank due diligence or regulatory review.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY structures audit logs, role-based access, evidence retention and provider outputs within a secure on-premise environment enabling VASPs to meet institutional governance and bank due diligence requirements.
workflow_title: From access controls to audit evidence
workflow_description: SFTY structures role-based permissions, audit logs and evidence preservation to support controlled on-premise deployment with full compliance review and governance.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_title: Not another deployment. The audit-ready layer
why_sfty_description: SFTY provides enterprises with controlled, on-premise compliance workflows that connect provider outputs into traceable decisions, evidence, audit logs, and secure operational governance.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY supports VASPs seeking controlled on-premise deployments with scalable provider orchestration, evidence integrity and bank due diligence for institutional compliance.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance
ask_sfty_placeholder: How can SFTY support on-premise compliance data control
ask_sfty_chip_1_message: Explain role-based access and audit logs in deployment
ask_sfty_chip_2_message: Show how evidence integrity is preserved for audits
ask_sfty_chip_3_message: Compare provider orchestration in enterprise on-premise setups
ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for institutional compliance?
faq_1_answer: SFTY provides a compliance control layer connecting provider outputs, policies and rules into structured workflows, helping institutional clients manage digital asset compliance with clarity, scalability and audit readiness.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY handle case workflows?
faq_2_answer: SFTY structures alerts, provider data and regulatory updates into case workflows with role-based assignment, decision logging, escalation paths and evidence collection for consistent, auditable compliance operations.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve audit evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves evidence packages, decision logs and review history with secure audit logs, supporting traceability for regulatory inspections and internal governance processes.
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY supports controlled on-premise deployments with configurable role-based access, audit logging, data governance and integration into enterprise compliance stacks.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace existing compliance providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY sits above KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers, connecting their outputs into connected compliance workflows without replacing underlying providers.
final_description: Explore how SFTY supports enterprise data control, audit logs, role-based access and scalable workflows for regulated VASPs.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.
footer_contact_title: For supervisory, compliance and deployment discussions.
footer_legal_notice: This page is for informational purposes only and does not constitute legal, regulatory or compliance advice. SFTY deployment depends on jurisdiction, client requirements and applicable laws.
